title: 2025 06 21 On Bubbas
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir saw Dominic in person and confirms the rumors: he's "a brain dead potato," speaking in abstract cosmology (god is a mushroom, jumps universes by killing himself, latent telepathy).
  • Dominic is in his bed with no phone, no indulgences, just staring at the ceiling — Yahir flags this as "more than depression."
  • The family system around him is collapsing in parallel: Sammy wants closeness with his brother, Maile is burnt out and moving out, Tío Edgar is jaded and moving to Mexico.
  • Yahir commits: he and his sister will be there for Sammy — but he's honest that Dominic's outcome may be suicide, slow re-integration, or institutionalization.
  • Dominic himself reads as fatalistic: "his outcome is determined and being manipulated by externals."

Notes

This is the cleanest single-source description of Dominic's state in the vault and the first explicit framing of Sammy as the kid Yahir is choosing to show up for. The note isn't speculative — Yahir saw him today and is recording the texture: the abstract cosmology, the empty bed, the absence of indulgence. He uses "aggressive loop" and "numb" together, which is the exact tonal register that recurs in later Dominic entries.

The family-collapse inventory is the load-bearing context. It's not just Dominic — it's the whole protective ring around him peeling off at the same time: Maile burnt out, Tío Edgar leaving for Mexico (which also surfaces in the Austin packing list two months later as "say goodbye to Tío Edgar"). The note positions Yahir as the one stepping into the gap for Sammy, not for Dominic — that distinction matters and shapes the later move to Austin decision.

Connections

  • dominic — clearest in-vault snapshot of his state.
  • sammy — Yahir explicitly commits as caretaker.
  • maile / tio edgar — peripheral family pulling away simultaneously.
  • yahir family — system-level view.
  • 2025 08 21 austin — Tío Edgar's Mexico departure recurs there.

related.label: Dominic dreams — sadistic doctor + court loop, Nov 2024
